name: skoldpad
description: Sköldpad 1.1 - a columnar-staggered split keyboard built with ergogen and KiCad
author: Martin Isaksson <7222170+martisak@users.noreply.github.com>

scripts.ergogen:watch: nodemon --ext .js,.yaml --watch ergogen/footprints --watch ergogen/config.yaml --exec npm run ergogen:build
